channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: 16-year-old Litlhonolofatso Litlhakanyane wins first SAFTA for Scandal! role, thanks mentor Jerry Mofokeng
item.description: At the 19th South African Film and Television Awards (SAFTAs) held on Saturday night at the Gallagher Convention Centre in Johannesburg, young actor Litlhonolofatso Litlhakanyane, aged just 16, clinch...

item.title: Comprehensive Guide to Eldoret Technical Training Institute Courses, Fees, and Application Process
item.description: Eldoret Technical Training Institute (ETTI) ni registered TVET college in Kenya ambayo ilianzishwa mwaka 2009 na kupokea accreditation kutoka Ministry of Higher Education, Science and Technology mwaka...

item.title: Socialized housing projects exempted from farmland conversion limits, DHSUD says
item.description: The Department of Human Settlements and Urban Development (DHSUD) welcomed the recent exemption of socialized housing projects from the farmland conversion moratorium imposed by the Department of Agri...

item.title: Guide to Courses, Fees and Application at Siaya National Polytechnic
item.description: Siaya Institute of Technology, now known as Siaya National Polytechnic, is a well-established vocational and technical institution located along Siaya–Ugunja Road, near Siaya County Referral Hospital....

item.title: ADC Aspirant Ayodele Adio Calls for Reversal of 13% Lagos BRT Fare Increase
item.description: An aspirant for the Lagos State House of Assembly under the African Democratic Congress (ADC), Ayodele Adio, has reacted to the recent 13 per cent increase in fares across all schemes under the state’...

item.title: Meningitis outbreak in Canterbury claims two lives, including a University of Kent student
item.description: Two people, including a student at the University of Kent, have died following an outbreak of invasive meningitis in Canterbury. A further eleven individuals, mostly aged between 18 and 21, are report...

item.title: Pope Leo Calls for Immediate Ceasefire Amid Escalating Iran Conflict
item.description: Pope Leo, the first US-born pope, made a heartfelt appeal on March 15, 2026, urging an immediate ceasefire in the ongoing Iran war. Speaking during his weekly Angelus prayer at St. Peter's Square, he ...

item.title: Practical Ways to Support Hedgehogs in Your Garden and Community
item.description: Hedgehogs in the UK are facing serious threats, including habitat loss, pesticides affecting their food supply, road traffic, and climate change. Since 2000, rural hedgehog populations have declined b...

item.title: Medvedev defeats Alcaraz to reach Indian Wells final, will play Sinner
item.description: In a thrilling semifinal at Indian Wells, Russia's Daniil Medvedev ended top-seeded Carlos Alcaraz's unbeaten run of 16 matches this year, defeating him 6-3, 7-6 (3). Alcaraz had entered the match on ...

item.title: United States defeats Canada 6-2 in Paralympic ice hockey final; Canada earns silver
item.description: Canada's Para ice hockey team secured the silver medal at the Milan Cortina 2026 Paralympics following a 6-2 defeat against the United States in the gold medal final. U.S. defenceman Jack Wallace scor...

item.title: WHO Allocates $2 Million in Emergency Support to Lebanon, Iraq, and Syria
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has announced the release of US$2 million in emergency funds to support Lebanon, Iraq, and Syria amid ongoing humanitarian and health crises. These funds are intend...

item.title: How to Make Warm Cinnamon Waffles with Butter
item.description: This recipe from the Sydney Morning Herald introduces a simple yet indulgent take on waffles, featuring a warm, lightly spiced cinnamon flavour complemented by a generous spread of pure triple-churned...

item.title: Philip Conrad Acop Wins Special Election for Antipolo 2nd District Congressional Seat with Low Voter Turnout
item.description: Antipolo City Councilor Philip Conrad Acop has been proclaimed the winner of the special election for the 2nd District congressional seat in Antipolo City, Rizal. This election was held on March 14, 2...

item.title: RFK Jr shares AI-generated video promoting healthy eating
item.description: Robert F. Kennedy Jr., the US Health and Human Services Secretary, recently shared an unusual AI-generated video depicting himself shirtless and wrestling a person in a Twinkie costume. The clip, capt...

item.title: Kiekie Clarifies She Keeps Husband Off Social Media Because Instagram Na Her Business Page
item.description: Nollywood actress and popular content creator Kiekie, whose real name na Bukunmi Adeaga-Ilori, don open up say she no dey post pictures or videos of her husband on social media on purpose. She talk th...

item.title: Ed Miliband outlines Labour's stance on energy prices amid Middle East tensions
item.description: Labour's Energy Secretary, Ed Miliband, has affirmed that the government will act in the interests of citizens facing rising energy costs due to the ongoing conflict in Iran, though he did not specify...

item.title: Airlines announce fuel surcharge, causing ticket bookings to spike
item.description: Several major airlines in India, including Air India, IndiGo, and Akasa Air, have recently introduced a fuel surcharge on both domestic and international flights. This new surcharge has caused a notab...

item.title: Guide to Watching the Oscars and Key Contenders
item.description: The 2026 Oscar campaign has been dominated by the epic film 'One Battle After Another', starring Leonardo DiCaprio, which has garnered an impressive 13 nominations. Despite some setbacks, the movie ha...

item.title: How to Apply, Register, and Pay Fees at Sokoine University of Agriculture for 2026/2027
item.description: Sokoine University of Agriculture (SUA) in Morogoro, Tanzania, is a top public university focusing on agricultural sciences and allied fields. Prospective students, including form four, form six, and ...

item.title: Chiefs edge past Durban City 1-0 to halt losing streak
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs managed to avoid a fourth consecutive league defeat for the first time in their history with a narrow 1-0 win over Durban City on a chilly Sunday afternoon. Glody Lilepo scored the only ...
